name: Outrageous Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Bacon, cooked crisp and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot or Dutch oven.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil for 15 minutes, stirring every few minutes.
3. Reduce heat and let simmer for at least 2 hours, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
This recipe makes enough for 14-16 cans (about 1 1/2 quarts) when doubled.
